name: Jeweled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda in a separate bowl. Stir into the creamed mixture.
4. Mix in raisins, nuts, red candied cherries, green candied cherries, and chopped pineapple until evenly distributed.
5. Shape dough into 2-inch rolls and wrap tightly in waxed paper or foil.
6. Freeze rolls for at least 2 hours.
7. Remove from freezer and cut into 1/4-inch slices.
8. Place slices on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 12-14 dozen cookies
